title: Professional Portfolio
description: A modern, responsive portfolio website built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features dark/light mode toggle, smooth animations, and a clean, professional design optimized for showcasing work.
highlights: Implemented seamless dark/light mode with local storage persistence
Created fluid page transitions and micro-interactions using Framer Motion
Optimized performance with Next.js Image and static generation
Fully responsive design that works beautifully on all devices

title: E-Commerce Dashboard
description: A comprehensive dashboard for managing online store operations. Features real-time analytics, order management, and inventory tracking with an intuitive user interface.
highlights: Built responsive data visualizations with Recharts
Implemented real-time data updates and state management
Created reusable component library for consistent UI
Integrated with REST APIs for live data fetching

description: A New Attendance Monitoring that helps a company and the employees to monitor their attendance

title: Task Management App
description: A productivity application for managing tasks and projects. Features drag-and-drop organization, priority levels, and progress tracking to help users stay organized.
highlights: Implemented drag-and-drop functionality for task organization
Built persistent storage using local storage for offline support
Created intuitive UI with priority indicators and progress bars
Added filtering and sorting capabilities for task management

title: Cloud Task Workspace
description: A SaaS-style project and task management workspace with dashboard analytics, project and task CRUD flows, kanban views, team management, and account settings built for a modern cloud workflow.
review: Built with a Vite-powered React frontend, Firebase authentication, Vercel serverless APIs, and Neon PostgreSQL to deliver a full project workspace experience.
highlights: Built dashboard, project, task, team, profile, and settings flows in a SaaS-style workspace.
Implemented Firebase email and password authentication with backend token verification support.
Connected Vercel API routes to Neon PostgreSQL for project, task, and team data management.
Added both task list and kanban-style board experiences for flexible workflow tracking.

title: Brewlytics
description: A polished SaaS-style coffee shop dashboard that brings analytics, orders, inventory, and customer insights into one operator-focused workspace for faster day-to-day decisions.
highlights: Built a multi-page dashboard covering overview, analytics, orders, inventory, and customer intelligence for coffee shop operations.
Created shared workspace state for revenue trends, channel mix, customer segments, stock health, and order activity.
Added interactive filtering and actions for channel views, ticket status updates, inventory restocking, and insight workflows.
Designed a branded, responsive SaaS interface with reusable Vue components and coffee-focused visual storytelling.

title: Shopify Landing Page
description: A custom landing page template designed for Shopify stores. Features sections for products, testimonials, and call-to-action buttons optimized for conversions.
highlights: Created customizable sections using Nextjs
Optimized for fast loading and SEO performance
Designed mobile-first responsive layout
Integrated with Shopify's native features and apps

title: Dental Management System
description: A comprehensive dental clinic management system for scheduling appointments, managing patient records, tracking treatments, and handling billing. Streamlines clinic operations with an intuitive dashboard.
highlights: Built patient appointment scheduling with calendar integration
Implemented secure patient record management system
Created treatment tracking and history logs
Designed responsive dashboard for clinic staff
